Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-13-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Robert H. Peterson, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Anthony K. Armado, who was placed under oath and examined. Mr. Peterson appeared for plaintiff Adelaida A. Armado, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Mary Armado.
Default was entered against defendant on January 21, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on March 19, 2010.
Notice of Pendency of Action filed by plaintiffs on August 29, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Anthony K. Armado & Adelaida A. Armado, and against the Defaulted Defendant Mary Armado as follows:

The property in question shall be sold, and the net proceeds from the sale of the property shall be divided in equal thirds between the parties. Additionally, Eduardo C. Manuel is appointed referee.

Counsel for plaintiffs shall submit a proposed interlocutory judgment to the Court no later than April 16, 2010.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-08-2010 Continued To Apr-23-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2009 Continued To Feb-19-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
